# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

export default async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    res.statusCode = 405;
    res.end('Method Not Allowed');
    return;
  }

  const { headers, payload } = req.body;

  if (!payload) {
    res.statusCode = 400;
    res.end('Bad Request: Missing payload');
    return;
  }

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      controller.enqueue(Buffer.from(payload));
      controller.close();
    },
  });

  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain');
  Object.entries(headers).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    res.setHeader(key, value);
  });

  stream.pipeTo(new Response(res, { headers: res.getHeaders() }));
};
